key_learnings.description: Surprising only — not captured by prior lessons

spec_ambiguities.description: H9: spec readings that had to be guessed (test-author especially). On high/critical profiles these park the task for the operator BEFORE implementation spends tokens; advisory on lower profiles. I20: use the object form with corpus_covers='both' ONLY when the authored corpus passes under every reading of that ambiguity — such entries are discharged (advisory on all profiles); a bare string means 'one-reading' (blocks)
